name: Fusebase
description:
What Fusebase does

Fusebase, formerly known as Nimbus, is a new generation white label client portal with features to manage clients and their projects. The platform’s line of tools allows agencies to elevate their client experience with customization and automation.

Source: Fusebase

Key features 

  • Centralized project workspace for storing all your client information, project details, and team tasks.
  • AI project assistance to automate workflows.
  • A personalized dashboard for customizing the view of your agency's operations. 
  • Create custom dashboards for different teams or projects, and control client's access to pages in your space.
  • Real-time collaboration features with chat support ensure that your team and clients are always on the same page.
  • Planning and reporting tools  schedule activities and keep track of client satisfaction.

Benefits of Using Fusebase 

  • Fusebase automates workflows using AI, increasing your team’s productivity and freeing up more time for higher-level activities.
  • It is a white label client portal CRM for real-time collaboration with your clients and team.
  • It provides a centralized hub for managing client interactions, projects, and tasks.
  • It offers valuable insights into your agency's operations and the level of client satisfaction.
  • Most importantly, Fusebase is designed to grow with your agency, offering scalability and flexibility. 
  • It creates a personalized environment for your client which makes the process of onboarding easier.

Pricing 

  • Essential plan at $28/month
  • Plus at $73/month
  • Ultimate plan at $148 per month

Pros

✅Scalable 

✅AI automated working system

✅Easy communication with team members and client 

✅Easy onboarding process

Cons

🚫Overdependence on internet connection.

🚫Potential for data migration issues.

🚫It’s not compatible with some popular browsers.
